title: Household entity model on nanoclaw
summary: Provisional mapping of household members and groups (David, Partner, Owen, guests) onto nanoclaw's users, user_roles, agent_groups, and messaging_groups tables.
notes: Self-described as 'Initial proposal' with Status: Provisional. No ADR decision/consequences structure, no PRD user stories, no SPEC schema/contract — reads as planning-context prose explaining intended use of an existing schema. Classified DOC; medium confidence because it sits adjacent to spec territory (table mappings) but explicitly defers binding wiring to /setup.
